name: search_emails
description: Search emails in the inbox by keyword, sender, or date range. Returns a list of matching email summaries.

query.description: Search keyword to match in subject or body.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 10.

name: read_email
description: Read the full content of an email by its ID.

email_id.description: The unique ID of the email to read.

name: send_email
description: Compose and send a new email.

name: forward_email
description: Forward an existing email to another recipient.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to forward.

to.description: Recipient email address to forward to.

comment.description: Optional comment to include above the forwarded message.

name: delete_email
description: Delete an email by its ID. This action is irreversible.

email_id.description: The ID of the email to delete.
